name: kiosk-scene
description: Backend-agnostic kiosk scene engine for avatar-driven dashboards

scripts.release:kiosk-addon: pnpm build:hosted && pnpm sync:kiosk-addon-runtime && pnpm validate:kiosk-addon-runtime
scripts.typecheck: pnpm typecheck:packages && pnpm --filter @kiosk-scene/demo-generic typecheck && pnpm --filter @kiosk-scene/hosted-runtime typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm validate:demo && pnpm build:demo && pnpm release:kiosk-addon
